title: [feature request] Grid with no snapping, just for visual reference
body:
I work a lot with cropped images, and the grid helps a lot with the sense of the scale of the canvas (sometimes a pasted image is bigger than expected etc). I also prefer to stare at some soft lines, like in a workbook, over a completely blank canvas.

But in excalidraw, if I enable the visual grid the snapping feature is also turned on. I just want it as a visual reference guide, the snapping makes moving images not smooth.

* This toggle can be added to the UI in anyway, e.g. split "Show grid" into "Show visual grid" and "Grid mode"

> I would also love a wider selection of grids as suggested in https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/issues/6773

Another thing to note is that when using the grid as a visual guide, some drawings look worse or not contextualized without the grid, e.g. this tic tac toe:

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/26868611/8d17e4f5-e124-40c3-b7fb-8da5bb82abca)

* An option could be added in the export panel to keep the grid (at the expected canvas zoom level).

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/26868611/b24cfa35-07f2-4396-861f-865a158fcd4c)

This is not that important because you can just capture the window with any clipping tool. But would be nice to have a native export capable of exporting the whole canvas with better quality.

> I could open another issue for this if you like, didnt want to spam xD. Anyway jsut dopping some features and ideas to be tracked. Thanks for the app is amazing and the work!

author: lizuncong

title: Feature Request: One of The Most Important Features Excalidraw Needs!
body:
I wonder why this hasn't been implemented or requested yet. This feature is already implemented in draw.io, and I believe it would be extremely powerful to have it available in Excalidraw as well.

In draw.io, each node on the canvas has four anchors located on all edges (up, down, right, left), as shown in the image below:

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/116303766/694c8554-b046-40e2-a184-b5b1b16d5038)

These anchors allow you to link nodes to other nodes' anchors, enhancing the connectivity and structure of the diagram, as depicted in the following image:

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/116303766/3fe2c74d-6d70-407f-ac29-43eae7f5092a)

Additionally, you can link nodes to any point on the node itself, as shown in the image below:

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/116303766/8c767849-1b8d-4bb2-bdaa-888381b33586)

And finally, instant creation and connection of shapes:

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/116303766/adb2fb16-e9aa-4c54-8ac5-9c1a5addabd0)

Given the potential benefits of this feature, it's surprising that it hasn't been implemented or requested in Excalidraw yet. It could significantly enhance the drawing and diagramming capabilities of the tool.

title: [Feature request] Grid rotation / ruler.
body:
**Expected behavior(s):** 
1. The ruler should act as a guide point for hand drawn lines, whenever drawing sufficiently close to the ruler it shall stick to it. The angle should be modifiable by an input field/scroll wheel and have some kind of scale for better measurement. 
 a. Would require tons of work to implement, a whole tool to maintain 
2. A rotating grid, with the same controls as the above described 
 a. This is (I think) the better option, as it doesn't require reinventing the wheel, and doesn't affect the graphics of the whole interface (only background)
3. Rotating the whole plane.
 a. This option may be desirable, but considering it would require rotating everything, it may lead to confusion, and potentially headaches born by having rotating graphics.

The control may be located at the bottom left, to maintain coherent UI/UX design.
![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/79378620/80831335-3b4f-46c9-9078-0eeecf5991f7)

The way to go depends on the technical difficulties of implementing such feature, and other considerations to be made.

title: [Deps] Check for breaking changes in Dependabot's PRs
body:
We noticed there were quite a number of Dependabot's PRs open in Excalidraw's repository. We ran Adaptly on a couple to help you catch breaking changes in these new versions. Our tool goes through the changelogs of the new versions and reports the breaking changes with a comment in the PR.
You can see the comments posted here:
- ✅ https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/pull/4399
- ⚠️ https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/pull/5237

It's completely free and plug-and-play since you are already using Dependabot.
You can install it from here: https://github.com/marketplace/adaptly
We would love to hear your feedback! : )

author: dwelle

title: disable reverse binding from shapes to arrows
body:
Currently we binding to arrows bidirectionally, that is you can bind an arrow to a rectangle, but you can also binding a rectangle to an arrow (by dragging).

This results in too many false positives when dragging an element into a vicinity of an arrow auto-binds it which you often don't want.

I'm proposing disabling binding from shape->arrow, and only keep the arrow->shape.

EDIT: poll [here](https://twitter.com/excalidraw/status/1697286297281282324). Seems like vast majority in favor.

title: Right Click Menu - Paste does not paste Images from Clipboard inside Obsidian Excalidraw
body:
I believe this is a bug, not a feature request

Steps to reproduce ( I am on Win10 using the Excalidraw plugin inside Obsidian):

Generate image with a clipping/snipping/screenshot tool.
Copy image straight to system clipboard. In Snipping Tool there is a button "Copy" which does this.
Open Obsidian, go to any Excalidraw drawing.
Right Click with mouse to open Right Click Menu.
Select Paste.

Result:

Either nothing appears or any previously copied text will appear.

Workaround:

CTRL + v
Inside the Excalidraw drawing using the hotkey CTRL + v will easily Paste the image into the drawing.

Comments:

I have no complaints about the CTRL + v workflow, I was simply stuck thinking that since the Right Click->Paste didn't work that pasting an image from the clipboard was not yet implemented in Excalidraw so I have misguidedly been saving clipped/snipped images to disk and then dragging those images into Obsidian and then into Excalidraw.

I could not test this on other systems so it very well may be my setup specifically that I have broken.

title: Support `ExcalidrawElement` subtypes
body:
#6037 provides `ExcalidrawElement` subtypes.  See #3915 for a (mostly up-to-date) description of subtypes.

Subtypes are of interest beyond decoupling MathJax support from the main Excalidraw npm package. In contrast to custom elements, subtypes permit leveraging existing `ExcalidrawElement` types in custom ways.

author: ElliIsmail

title: Exported SVGs lack SVG path data
body:
Images exported from Excalidraw as `.svg` do not contain any line pathing data and are unable to be used in a proper SVG application.

## Steps
- find or download a normal (non-Excalidraw-created) `.svg` asset from the web
- open in a site or tool like https://boxy-svg.com/
- mouse over objects and note the separate lines and paths which can be moved, etc.
- now open an exported Excalidraw `.svg` file
- mouse over objects, there is no path or line information

I get that _just adding `.svg` support to Excalidraw_ is an awesome and appreciated feature. However, it seems like Excalidraw objects are already vector-like in nature; it would be amazing to get diagrams exported with path info in a well-known format like SVG.

Hello! It's me again. This time, my reason for creating this issue is to ask for advice and information.

Currently, I want to store files/scenes in the cloud. The idea is to create the file and by accessing, for example, this URL: **localhost:3000/file/[fileId]**, you can obtain the file without the need for a secret key. Additionally, any collaborator who enters that URL should be able to view the file/scene and start working in real-time using Excalidraw-room.

Now, with this change, how can I store my files? I'm not sure if I should encrypt them or not. If I encrypt them, should I also store the key in the same database to decrypt them? Or should I store the files in S3 (as .json or binary file), or store them in SQL as a Blob? I'm not very sure which is the best and most optimal option for this.

I appreciate you reading this, and I would greatly appreciate it if you could provide some help.
author: rossaai

title: Excalidraw+ not opening in PWA
body:
Hi! ,

I was using the Excalidraw PWA and earlier I was able to open and see the files as well as have the entire functionality of Excalidraw+ in the PWA. However, with the upgrade to Google Chrome version: 116.0.5845.179, only Excalidraw opens in PWA and in case of clicking on the Excalidraw+ it is taking me to the browser instead of PWA.
author: jaideepkaramchandani

title: sync with files in github repository
body: draw.io has this feature
author: 0x8f701

title: pop-up menu position
body:
Thank you for creating a great program.

I wish the pop-up menu that appears when I click on the toolbox at the top appears on the right instead of the left.
(Or, I wish it could be adjusted left and right)
author: jnhyeon

title: Image links are broken
body:
Hi team,

Excalidraw+ user here - many drawings of mine display a "n/a image" all of the sudden (gray placeholder, as if the image is not there).

These are all drawings which I've been using for the past weeks with no issues.
The issue even persists with new drawings I started today: pasting an image and switching back and forth to a different drawing shows broken links.

This issue is stopping me from using my drawings at the moment, can you please assist?
Thanks in advance!
author: orperel

title: Find Feature in Canvas
body: I feel if we have find option within canvas so it will be easy to find out where we have written text

title: Rethink keymappings to make them available for left hand
body:
I think the app is great. Just a small enhancement. Normally Right Handers will use mouse with right hand and keyboard with left hand. The problem is that all the mapped keys are available with left hand except H, P and L. Is there any way to remap them or allow custom remapping for user. That would be a tremendous boost in productivity. 

I love the App. 

Thanks in advance!!!

author: VaibhavAPatil

title: Tests location proposal
body:
In the spirit of #6987, I am opening this issue to propose streamlining the locations of tests into predetermined directories.  Some ideas:
1. All tests reside inside a second-level directory named `tests`: eg `excalidraw-app/tests` or `src/tests`.
2. All tests reside inside a `tests` subdirectory of the directory for the code they cover: eg `testWysiwyg.test.tsx` would live in `src/element/tests/`.
3. Eliminate `tests` directories altogether; make tests go in the same directory as the code they cover; and place test helpers in a first-level directory: eg `src/tests/helpers/api.ts` would move to `test-helpers/api.ts`.

@excalidraw Thoughts?
author: DanielJGeiger

title: Intermittent test failure
body:
The test added in 5191cdb sometimes fails, sometimes passes.  When it fails, the first line of `updateTextEditor()` gives the message "Error: Unable to fire a "change" event - please provide a DOM element."  This occurs on the first call of `updateTextEditor()` from the test.

I tried wrapping the arrow element creation in `beforeEach(...)`.  However, I've still seen the test fail a few times with such a change.

title: Embed request ^_^ https://blocks.glass
body:
Hey Folks! 

We're big fans of Excalidraw at [Looking Glass](https://lookingglassfactory.com)! We make holographic displays, and ways to embed holograms on the internet via [Blocks](https://blocks.glass)! 

It'd be so cool to be able to embed these in Excalidraw! Let us know if there's anything we can do to help support that ^_^ <3 

Here's an example embed code: [https://blocks.glass/embed/648](https://blocks.glass/embed/648)

title: Feature request - Merge Hand mode and selection mode
body:
Hi,

I took few inspiration from miro and wanted to suggest how this experience would look in the app. Because from the user, they will have to constantly switch from selection to hand mode where as, moving the hand mode as part of right mouse down event will smoothen user experience.

![Screenshot 2023-09-19 at 11 41 36 AM](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/6542274/90b61ffe-4f55-471b-82ba-82698cfbbf57)
author: ghost

title: Revenue generation model - Proposal
body:
Hi,

I created a concept that saves cost for business, big organisations in terms of building and maintenance of web application. I figured out a way to bridge gap from design to code, and built a concept for frontend. since frontend abstracts big problems and it being a core, a lot software application that is frontend heavy can be built and maintained using the technology.

The selling point here is low cost when compared to huge engineering teams needed to build and maintain apps. You can have a look at the code generation for UI/Backend etc here https://github.com/imvetri/ui-editor.

With Excalidraw's infinite canvas and my code generation technology, we can see a business value. Feel free to let me know if you would like to discuss, I'll be glad to hop in.

author: syckki

title: Control-z does not work when making an arrow and not yet finished
body:
I'm using excalidraw.com  on Firefox 114

Steps to reproduce

1. select an arrow  
2. draw the first dot 
=> now your cursor is in a state where moving the cursor , move the arrow's head
3. hit control-z 
=> nothing happens

Expected behaviour:

it should undo the last dot (and if it's the last way point, it should undo the shape) 


Currently I often see myself in the following situation


I do an arrow,  and instead of finishing it , I add one more "way point" by mistake , I do control-z , it does not work, i try to click somewhere, it add more way point which create way more frustration.

To clarify, I don't think it's an issue if for a "finished" arrow, doing undo simply undo the whole arrow.
author: allan-simon

title: Do not change emoji colors in dark mode
body:
Changing the color font dynamically depending on the selected theme makes sense, but not changing the emoji figures. The association I have emojis gets completely disrupted by modifying them. It makes it look very odd and some of them lose their meaning

title: Creating ESM build for package @excalidraw/excalidraw
body:
## WHY
We currently only support the `UMD` build for the package which works well for the browser as well as the node. 
But we also lose the benefits of tree shaking and importing specific utils which aren't possible with`umd ` build.

One recent example is the package [@excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw](https://github.com/excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw) where we wanted to import only a function `convertToExcalidrawElements` from the package but to do that we will need to add `react`, `react-dom` unnecessarily which leads to increase in bundle size as well as taking more bandwidth.

Hence we should support the **ESM** build, the **UMD** build will always be there for fallback.

With **ESM** Build we can support
1.  Importing specific functions as needed without importing the whole bundle
2. Tree shaking, dead code elimination, and better code splitting as bundlers will have full control over it
3. In  [@excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw](https://github.com/excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw)  we can start using `convertToExcalidraw` function so the host doesn't need to call it explicitly when using the package

## HOW

There are a few changes needed in the codebase before we start supporting ESM

- [x] Code separation of excalidraw-app and package - This would make sure the package has only the package code and make it easier to create an ESM build so we don't ship unnecessary code in the package - https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/pull/6987
- [ ] Decouple package dependencies for package and app - This will make sure all the dependencies needed for the package are present in its own package json - https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/pull/7021
- [ ] Move the build process of excalidraw-app inside excalidraw-app folder as well - this is good to have and will help mono repo architecture faster. - https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/pull/7021
- [ ] Update typescript to 5.x.x and use `NodeNext` as module resolution and module to support ESM syntax eg https://github.com/excalidraw/mermaid-to-excalidraw/pull/30
- [ ] Compile to JS using tsc and test

With these changes for the ESM build, we will also get closer to Monorepo architecture

title: BUG: Weird jumping behavior when using the API's `initialData` compared to `updateScene`
body: I'm using the `@excalidraw/excalidraw` package using `0.16.1` and encountered a weird behavior I cannot explain. I've attached a GIF below describing what happens: - Initially I have a "line" element (which is closed to a polygon) which I set via `initialData`. - After 2000ms, I update the scene using `updateScene` using the same element declaration, - Suddenly the polygon "jumps" a few pixels. - Clicking on the wrongly-positioned polygon to select it, brings it back to its right place. ![weird](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/1366521/070a4a79-fc0a-4078-bb30-99720bdff4f6) Also when exporting the element as image (even when it's in the wrong visual position), it ends up resolving to the right position. Example of canvas having the wrong position and export actually getting it right: This is the element's JSON when I set it via `initialData`: ```json [ { "id": "EbpYLM5ixpnUKAlBowaBq", "type": "line", "x": 0, "y": 0, "width": 300, "height": 0, "angle": 0, "strokeColor": "hsla(0, 1%, 0%, 0.5)", "backgroundColor": "hsla(79, 1%, 50%, 1)", "fillStyle": "solid", "strokeWidth": 1, "strokeStyle": "solid", "roughness": 0, "opacity": 100, "groupIds": [ "axial-extruded-0-0" ], "frameId": null, "roundness": null, "seed": 566843360, "version": 1, "versionNonce": 0, "isDeleted": false, "boundElements": null, "updated": 1695385967311, "link": null, "locked": false, "points": [ [ 39.98886247269574, 0.7219065562537674 ], [ 19.17702154416813, 26.848486646358303 ], [ 14.382766158126099, -44.28540373900038 ], [ 29.991646854521807, -63.88033880657878 ], [ 39.98886247269574, 0.7219065562537674 ] ], "lastCommittedPoint": null, "startBinding": null, "endBinding": null, "startArrowhead": null, "endArrowhead": null } ] ``` And this is the same element when I set it via `updateScene`. (According to diff-checker the only diffs are `id`, `seed` and `updated`, which makes sense as they are being generated using the same code). ```json [ { "id": "N9NmcM8iNUV6wTcdtXxGN", "type": "line", "x": 0, "y": 0, "width": 300, "height": 0, "angle": 0, "strokeColor": "hsla(0, 1%, 0%, 0.5)", "backgroundColor": "hsla(79, 1%, 50%, 1)", "fillStyle": "solid", "strokeWidth": 1, "strokeStyle": "solid", "roughness": 0, "opacity": 100, "groupIds": [ "axial-extruded-0-0" ], "frameId": null, "roundness": null, "seed": 1676568544, "version": 1, "versionNonce": 0, "isDeleted": false, "boundElements": null, "updated": 1695385969331, "link": null, "locked": false, "points": [ [ 39.98886247269574, 0.7219065562537674 ], [ 19.17702154416813, 26.848486646358303 ], [ 14.382766158126099, -44.28540373900038 ], [ 29.991646854521807, -63.88033880657878 ], [ 39.98886247269574, 0.7219065562537674 ] ], "lastCommittedPoint": null, "startBinding": null, "endBinding": null, "startArrowhead": null, "endArrowhead": null } ] ``` Note that I created the polygon using the minimal requirements and then passing it through `convertToExcalidrawElements`. So I just declared `x`, `y`, `points` and the fill/stroke styles. The `width` and `height` do indeed seem weird, but they are auto-determined by the `convertToExcalidrawElements` function I suppose. I also tried grouping the polygon with other polygons but the behavior is the same. This clearly seems like a bug, but I fail to understand why it happens with this SPECIFIC polygon shape. When. I try other, similar, polygon shapes, it's actually okay (you can see it in the GIF, only one polygon jumps). **Update**: After posting this issue I also noticed the shape is kind of cut on the right side when it's in the wrong position, which makes it seem like a bug further.

title: Feature: Text Casing Conversion🍏🖋️
body:
**Issue Description:** 🛠️
As a user of this application, I would like to request the addition of a case conversion feature that allows users to convert text between different letter casing styles easily. This feature would be valuable for various use cases such as formatting text or simply for personal preference. The following letter casing styles are commonly used and should be supported:

1. **Sentence Case**: Begin with a capital letter for the first word of a sentence and keep the rest in lowercase.
2. **lowercase**: Adopt a casual, all-lowercase style.
3. **UPPER CASE**: Make a bold statement with uppercase letters.
4. **Capitalized Case**: Elevate text with capitalization for the first letter of each word.
5. **Title Case**: Provide a touch of sophistication by capitalizing significant words while keeping articles, conjunctions, and prepositions in lowercase.
6. **InVeRsE CaSe**: Turn text into a playful and quirky format by flipping uppercase and lowercase letters.

**Use Case Scenario:** 📋
In this scenario, a user engages with a whiteboard or sketch with the aim of refining the text's appearance for clarity or artistic expression. The introduction of this feature would allow users to seamlessly switch between these letter casing styles without the need for manual editing.

**Expected Behavior:** 🤞
The expected behavior is as follows:

- The user should be able to select either a portion or the entire text on the whiteboard or sketch.
- The tool's menu or toolbar should prominently display an option for text casing conversion.
- Upon selecting this option, a dropdown menu or button should present the user with the available casing styles listed above.
- After selecting a style and applying it, the text should transform to match the chosen casing style while maintaining its original context within the whiteboard or sketch.

![UI](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/38225598/d546e966-ac08-426d-bc2a-975047df9a69)

**Additional Notes:** 📝
For enhanced user efficiency, it's suggested to consider implementing intuitive shortcuts (keyboard shortcuts or stylus gestures) that expedite case conversion, particularly in sketching scenarios. Furthermore, the inclusion of a "Clear Formatting" option would be appreciated to restore the text to its original state while retaining its position and context within the whiteboard or sketch.

**References:** 📚
Similar features can be found in graphics software and text manipulation tools, enhancing user convenience in creative settings.

Thank you for considering this feature request. Implementing it would significantly enhance the functionality and versatility of our Whiteboard & Sketching Tool, catering to both the creative and practical needs of our users.

title: [Feature Suggestion] Toggle Pressure Simulation
body:
Greetings,

I describe here a phenomena that occurs, and following that I describe a feature suggestion that stops it from occurring..

# Steps to Reproduce

- Use the drawing tool (of any thickness size) with a standard mouse
- Zoom in to see the effects more clearly
- Start drawing a line with the drawing tool, moving it slowly from one point to another
- Repeat the previous step, but this time draw a line with the drawing tool while moving it faster from one point to another

# Expected Outcome

Both lines looking exactly the same

#  Actual Result

The lines drawn vary in thickness,
the line drawn slowly is thicker than the line drawn faster.

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/43674238/86ee0ab0-8391-4496-910d-23844bf5a70c)

# Feature Suggestion

Add a toggle button that enables or disables this thickness variablity (which appears to be pressure simulation).

Here's a mockup:

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/43674238/dca55f01-7966-4ad5-8e51-b99d9e677789)

author: samiraluee

title: laser pointer offset in Obsidian.md
body:
In Obsidian.md Excalidraw is hosted in a DIV container `.workspace-leaf` that has the CSS property `contain: strict !important`. As a consequence `position: fixed` does not position `.LaserToolOverlay` relative to the viewport but relative to `.workspace-leaf`. When Excalidraw is hosted in an app or website I can imagine other instances as well when the container has this CSS configuration.

As a result, the laser pointer has an offset.

https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/14358394/872f8406-f6d2-47ae-95f3-caf25292167c

Adding appState.offset to LaserToolOverlay in LaserTool.tsx solves the problem.
```typescript
    <div
      className="LaserToolOverlay"
      style = {{
        top: `-${appState.offsetTop}px`,
        left: `-${appState.offsetLeft}px`,
      }}
    >
```

author: AMGMNPLK

title: setting the default palette background color for iframe introduction method
body:
Hello, excalidraw team

I have a question to consult with you. I directly introduced the link through iframe（ https://excalidraw.com/ ）But the result I want is that the default color for the background of the drawing board is transparent. Should I add attributes or styles to the iframe tag to achieve this effect?

Could you please give me a reply to help me solve this problem? Thank you!
author: Never99

title: Form Field Missing ID or Name Attribute
body: ### Issue Description The issue is related to form fields that lack both an ID and a name attribute, which could potentially prevent browsers from correctly autofilling the form. ### Steps to Reproduce 1. Locally run excalidraw. 2. See the issues tab in inspect mode. ### Expected Behavior Issues tab in inspect mode should not show id or name attribute related problem. ### Screens ### Environment - Operating System: Apple M2 pro, macos - Browser (if web-related): chrome - Any other relevant environment details: vs code text editor ### Labels bug ### Related Issues There is another issue which might pertain to the issue mentioned here which is Duplicate form field id in the same which can be noticed above in the screenshot.
author: starlove54

title: How to replay the data?
body:
I want to store the elements data, and replay it later. 
But the element data has no `timestamp` attribute, the `update` attribute will be changed when update an element, use it to replay is incorrect. 
Should I store  the elements by myself, Like redux snapshot?
author: yurnery

title: Assign short-cut key for "Live collaboration" tab
body: While exploring the excalidraw.com (Link: [website](https://excalidraw.com/)), i found an interesting enhancement that could be integrated inorder to enhance user experience and it will boost easy-to-use website functionality overall. **Idea**: The major idea is to assign a short-cut key (e.g. ctrl+shift+L ) to directly open "Live collaboration" tab, currently we don't have any keys assign to them. Current scenario: Expected scenario: I wanted to work on this feature enhancement and if possible could you assign this feature enhancement Issue to me. ```[tasklist] ### Tasks ```
author: AkashKumarSingh11032001

title: How do I host my fork of Excalidraw on Vercel?
body:
I've been running into issues with this recently, it works just fine on `[localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000)` but I can't get it to deploy to Vercel, as it says that there isn't a directory called `dist`. The thing is that, in the logs it says the build completed as well, but fails to display them in the directory, as it doesn't exist. Now after I create a directory called `dist`, it says there isn't a `index` file (referring to an HTML file) in the `dist` directory. Now when I try it on CodeSandbox it works just fine too, but still, no luck with Github Pages or Vercel.
With Github Pages it just shows: `<% if ("%PROD%" === "true") { %> <% } %> <% if ("%VITE_APP_DEV_DISABLE_LIVE_RELOAD%"==="true" ) { %> <% } %>
<% if ("%VITE_APP_DEV_DISABLE_LIVE_RELOAD%" !== 'true') { %> <% } %>`

Could somebody please help me out here?
---------

title: Change SVG color
body:
It would be great to be able to change an SVG color.

For example for the following SVG, we could change the `fill` value (the root color) on the fly, without having to first edit the SVG, then re-import it:
```
<svg xmlns... width... height... fill="currentColor" class... viewBox...>
  <path ... />
</svg>
```

title: Outdated docs on serializeAsJson
body:
When I try to use `serializeAsJson` as mentioned in the docs [1],  I'm getting the following error.

> Expected 4 arguments, but got 2.ts(2554)
> json.d.ts(4, 109): An argument for 'files' was not provided.
> (alias) serializeAsJSON(elements: readonly ExcalidrawElement[], appState: Partial<AppState>, files: BinaryFiles, type: "local" | "database"): string
> import serializeAsJSON

It seems like the docs had not been updated when making the changes to method signature.

[1] https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs/@excalidraw/excalidraw/api/utils#serializeasjson

author: dwelle

title: Persistent Save To Dialog box
body: Issue Description I have identified an issue, specifically related to the Save To dialog. The problem is that the Save To dialog box does not disappear even after successfully saving the file. This persistence of the dialog creates a user experience issue as it continues to exist even after its intended purpose has been served. Steps to Reproduce To replicate this issue, please follow these steps: 1. Click on the hamburger icon located in the top left corner. 2. Choose "Save To" from the menu. 3. A Save To dialog box will appear. 4. Upon clicking "Save to File," another dialog box will open, requesting the path for the file to be saved and the desired file name. 5. After clicking "Save," the Save To dialog box remains visible on the screen, failing to close as expected. Screenshots: 1. after performing step 2 2. after performing step 4 4.after performing step 5 This behavior disrupts the user flow and can be confusing to users who expect the Save To dialog to disappear after successfully saving the file. Thank you for your attention to this matter. I hope this issue can be addressed to enhance the overall user experience of Excalidraw.

There are bugs that surface when two users use the canvas simultaneously.
A good entry point might be checking out [CRDTs](https://crdt.tech/implementations) or this example of a hand-rolled editor [described here](https://jakelazaroff.com/words/building-a-collaborative-pixel-art-editor-with-crdts/).

title: macOS Sonoma "docked web app": Cmd+H activates Hand, rather than hide the front-most app
body:
Not sure if this is something that's specific to Excalidraw – I've not encountered it with other "docked" web apps on Sonoma. If I hit "H", the hand tool activates as expected. If I use Cmd+H, the system-wide "Hide App" shortcut, it also activates the hand tool rather than hide the front-most application, when I am in the standalone Excalidraw app. This does NOT happen when Excalidraw is open in a regular tab in Safari. It would be super useful to fix this quirk if possible!

PS. Thank you for an amazing tool; Excalidraw is such an outstanding app in every respect! <3
author: pcholakov

title: rewrite `App` class instance fields methods to class methods
body: Class instance fields are copied for every editor instance which might affect memory/GC in multi-instance scenarios, and potentially even in single-instance if we instantiate often (e.g. when changing scenes often).
author: dwelle

title: [filesystem] reduce file size by minify the `.excalidraw` file
body:
Hi,
I've notice that the file size get a little to big, too quickly. 

Using this image for reference:

![Screenshot 2023-10-18 at 14 44 33](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/96259932/a9df68d3-837a-4154-8d52-9c6527e1cb46)

it will occupy `612K`, for a rather small drawing. 

After opening the `.excalidraw` with my text editor I see that the json is "prettified". I don't really understand this decision, since I don't think someone is consume or modify the json by hand. Wouldn't be better just minify the `.excalidraw` files and save a lot of space?

For reference the file size of the same file, after been minify with `jq -r tostring`, is `296K`. That same file opens fine in the browser.

![Screenshot 2023-10-18 at 14 53 59](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/96259932/bc3c83d2-0877-456c-b3a4-a31269653ea6)

title: Collision between Full Screen "F" and Frame Tool "F" keyboard shortcut
body:
According to the Excalidraw help menu, "Full Screen" mode can be toggled with <kbd>F</kbd>:

![screenshot from excalidraw help showing full screen mode can be toggled with the F key](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/11916674/e6fe3913-360a-4385-ad4e-865412b21bed)

... but the "Frame Tool" also uses <kbd>F</kbd>:

![screenshot from excalidraw help showing the frame tool can be selected with the F key](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/11916674/fff34c29-3a8e-47d4-b90a-7961e63eedfc)

When using https://excalidraw.com/ (`v0.16.1`?) it looks like the frame tool is getting precedence, and I'm having trouble getting the full screen mode to work.

Maybe rebind to <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>F</kbd>?

title: Collision between Hand tools "H" and Distribute Horizontally "ALT+H" keyboard shortcuts
body:
### Steps to reproduce
1. Open a scene with objects
2. Select all
3. press ALT+H
### Error obtained
![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/11302277/a8e7ac91-f28e-4518-9ba0-082267f485bf)
### Fix
The shortcut `H` for Hand tools doesn't filter out the `ALT` key presses.
Adding this filter should fix this issue.

title: Cursor color becomes invisible (white) in excalidraw's light mode when cursor leaves the canvas
body:
## Steps to reproduce:

1.  Open excalidraw in light mode. Your cursor will be set to black by default.
2. Choose the pencil tool.
3. Draw something
4. Take your cursor to the top of the browser (E.g. hover over the URL or your open tabs)
5. Take your cursor back to the canvas. It'll now be white, which is invisible in a light background.

Tested on Windows + Chrome

title: Image upload doesn't work(ImageBlobReduce: failed to create Image() from blob error)
body:
I'm trying to upload an image to https://excalidraw.com(also on a self hosted app).

title: Thoughts on using Excalidraw as a presentation tool for the first time
body:
Hey! I've been a paying user for a while now, but I just used Excalidraw as a presentation tool for the first time and I thought I'd share my notes.

0. First of all I'd like to say thanks for adding this mode, it's super useful and makes me very happy that I can use my favorite drawing app to present too!

1. the vast majority of time and confusion was due to the assignment of objects to frames, which is pretty confusing. I had a few problems:

a) If you make a frame and don't get the size right initially, the things you bound are "stuck" to the frame and you basically have to delete and start again.

b) Many times I'd add a frame, when I went into presentation mode, things were missing, and it wasn't clear how to solve that, I would try making the frame bigger and some things would be outlined in blue, but then they'd be missing in the presentation view.

c) If I wanted to frame a set of other frames and then zoom in, it seemed to get confused about what objects were associated with frames.

d) The alignment tools don't seem to be aware of frames, so you can't easily center and align objects with your frames.

Ideally I'd like it if there just wasn't this seemingly strange relationship between frames and objects. and that frames were just views on the document.

2. Embedded videos aren't playable from presentation modem that meant that I had to keep jumping out of presentation mode to play a video and then jump back into the presentation, which was obviously very clunky.

3. Sharing: I wanted to share the presentation but allow people to play the embedded videos, that wasn't possible. I then tried to share the presentation itself in a read-only mode that let them run the presentation, but that wasn't possible so I wasn't able to easily share with my team (even though you have like every other permutation of easy sharing! :) )

Thanks!

title: rewrite Dialog/Modal responsive-desgn
body: to use viewport media queries instead of editor container size queries since we display modals over whole viewport.
author: dwelle

title: change frame resizing behavior
body:
# status quo

right now frames follow the figma/browser behavior where each corner has _seemingly_ different and arbitrary resizing behavior.

It's actually quite logical and has a single simple rule: frame children are positioned relative top-left corner of the frame, similarly how all canvas elements are positioned relative to [0,0] position of the canvas. Thus, resizing the frame from different sides moves (or doesn't move) the frame's top-left position, and thus moves the children.

# problem

While it's logical, it may still be unexpected.

What's more, even if you know the rule and expect the behavior, I'd argue that in 95% of the cases you don't want this behavior.

Instead, when people resize a frame, they want to make space for more content in the frame. They don't want the content to move. More importantly, if you want to add content to above or to the right of the frame's content, you can't really do it without first resizing the frame and then selecting all children and moving them to make space.

# proposal

Resizing a frame shouldn't move the children _at all_.

Exception being resizing multiple frames at once, see https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/issues/6793

title: Incorrect mouse position when showing Excalidraw editor inside Dialog window
body:
## Bug description
Mouse is incorrectly capturing the position over components (and the start of arrows etc.) when the editor is shown inside the Dialog window (I use one from https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui).

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to https://coursition.com/demo/excalidraw/edit
2. Add component `Excalidraw`
3. Open the editor
4. Use the editor and see that things behave "weirdly" about the mouse position - the arrow starts in another place, and you can't edit objects (like arrows, squares etc.) at their position but your mouse needs to be a bit below and to the right.
5. Resize the window so that the size of the Excalidraw window also changes (open DevTools => Mobile emulator => close DevTools).
6. Everything should work correctly.

## Current outcome
Position of the mouse is fixed only after the window resizes.

## Expected outcome
Position of the mouse is correct all the time.

## Related bugs
I reported the same thing inside Novel - https://github.com/steven-tey/novel/issues/234 but there it is even worse because the position of the mouse is not fixed when I resize the window. Seems to be related to the calculation of coordinates.

title: Disappear laser pointer drawings only when the user stopped writing
body:
Laser pointer is a great edition. It enabled to quickly highlight things without disturbing the actual content. But, it disappears quite fast and is difficult to get focus to a point in the canvas. The problem is, even when the user is writing, it starts disappearing from the other end.

https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/186833/c6525a45-34c0-453d-9842-43f89907aa29

The way PPT or some other tools handle is, the laser writing stays as long as you are continuing to write. Once you stop, it waits for few seconds and then disappears.

https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/186833/80253ea8-415a-4f68-8c3e-7b1aaf4f43e0



It would be helpful if the laser pointer writing stays as long as the user is writing and disappear a few seconds after the user stopped writing.

title: Unable to upgrade to v17.0 (jsxs undefined error)
body:
I have encountered an issue that prevents me from upgrading excalidraw to v17.0 in my host app. When I try, on page load I get the error: "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'jsxs')". If I try to force past that I then get "ExcalidrawLib is not defined".

My setup with v16.1 (which works well) is:

	const [excalidrawAPI, setExcalidrawAPI] = React.useState(null);

	React.createElement(ExcalidrawLib.Excalidraw, {
	  initialData: vText,
	  ref: (api) => setExcalidrawAPI(api),
	  ...
  
 Now, with v17.0, I am trying:
 
	const [excalidrawAPI, setExcalidrawAPI] = React.useState(null);
 
 	React.createElement(ExcalidrawLib.Excalidraw, {
	  initialData: vText,
	  excalidrawAPI: (api) => setExcalidrawAPI(api),
	  ...
	  
What am I doing wrong?
	  
Note that my environment does not support the import/export of components.

author: sedghi

title: A research for generating PR checklists in Pull Request Template
body:
Dear maintainers:
Our team is currently developing a tool for automatically generating PR checklists in Pull Request Template. The tool generates a set of PR rules based on the contribution guidelines in your project, which external contributors may be expected to adhere to. Below are the results of our generation:

**Test**: Add missing tests or correct existing tests.
**Documentation**: Documentation only changes
**Style**: do not affect the meaning of the code
**Title**: Make sure the title starts with a semantic prefix.

Also, we suggest you add some checklist notes about **Description**, **Branch**, **commit message**, **contributing**, and **cla**, which are also important for submitting PRs according to our analysis.

We hope you and your team can provide feedback on our generated output.
Best regards.
author: chenkun1029

title: The way that payload-type:application/vnd.excalidraw+json serialization works in SVG files breaks their compatibility with screen readers
body:
Hi folks,

Screen readers are unable to bypass whatever is inside 

```
payload-type:application/vnd.excalidraw+json
``` 

when exporting to SVG. 

**That severily impacts accessibility for visual impaired people**. Screen readers will read it as a giant blob of text.

My tests were made in the Edge browser.

I'm willing to work on this issue if maintainers find it interesting.

Thanks.
author: enzoferraribf

title: Regarding indexeddb, Priority change...
body:
Hello! I've been reading the following issue: https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/issues/1280

Large performance issues for large documents in Excalidraw is due to the app trying to save to localstorage after reaching the memory limit. The problem is that it's very easy to reach the localstorage limit for someone writing a lot by hand (f.e solving math problems or taking notes), and after that hard limit reach, it's more or less impossible to use the application due to continuous lag when writing. I don't know exactly what in the background of the saving process that causes the lag, but due to my console errors, I easily reach 100s of errors after a short time editing a document when it has reached the localstorage limit or above.

By looking at the previous discussions, I think this is a larger issue than what has been thought of. Multiple discussions can be found regarding lagging problems within Excalidraw, and I think some of them stem from this localstorage issue and large documents. 

As I only use the app for my own note-taking, I changed to IndexedDB and all the serious performance issues disappeared. This could be worth to finally implement as I think it will make the application a lot better for similar use-cases as mine.

I could do some contributions, but as the previous one https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/pull/1643 never got merged, I think it's better you do it your way.

author: Shweta21a

title: Shared undo regularly deletes our work
body:
When we're in a multi-user document, we regularly delete each other's work. This is very frustrating and makes what is an amazing tool very frustrating to use.

User A: make a new text area and type a load of stuff
User B: at the same time, be sketching
User B: Hit undo a lot to remove their sketches, also unintentionally deletes the large amount of text that User A made.

We're paying for ExcaliDraw+ as a team and this basically makes Excalidraw unusable and very dangerous for us to use as a group, especially in complex documents.

I think a much better approach would be to do what Google Docs does where each user has a server-side undo buffer. Maybe this requires Operational Transforms or CRDT's, but overall it would be better to just be dumb and have each client try and undo only their own things. Having someone else undo your work is incredibly frustrating and will likely lead us to just not use the collaboration features, or potentially just not use Excalidraw at all :(

Another option might be for use to be able to opt out of this behavior? It wouldn't be great, but being able to opt a drawing out of the shared undo buffer would be enough for us.

title: Feature Request: Make libraryReturnUrl more dynamic
body:
- As-is: libraryReturnUrl is set when the Excalidraw element is rendered.
- To-be: libraryReturnUrl can be set at any time after the Excalidraw element has been rendered.

My use case for this is that I have a page with url parameters whose values when Excalidraw is rendered are not always the same as when the user opens the library panel. Perhaps there could be some sort of API method that one could call at any time or an onLibraryOpen event with a property for libraryReturnUrl?

=========

```html

```

======

Problem is with the `0.17.0` release.

title: Firebase Integration Issue: Elements Hidden on 'Send to Back' and 'Bring to Front' in Excalidraw after 10 to 15 sec
body:
## Issue Description:

### Summary:
While actively collaborating in Excalidraw with Firebase integration, we've encountered a critical issue where performing "Send to Back" and "Bring to Front" actions on an element results in its visibility being compromised upon data retrieval from Firebase.

### Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open Excalidraw and connect it to Firebase.
2. Collaborate with others in real-time.
3. Draw or import images and shapes onto the canvas.
4. Choose an element and perform "Send to Back" and then "Bring to Front."
5. Save the changes to Firebase.
6. Retrieve the saved data from Firebase.

### Expected Behavior:
We anticipate that the positions and visibility of the elements should be maintained seamlessly after performing "Send to Back" and "Bring to Front" actions, even during active collaboration.

### Actual Behavior:
Upon retrieving data from Firebase, we've observed that images and shapes subjected to "Send to Back" or "Bring to Front" actions are either hidden or not displayed as intended.

### Screenshots/Recordings:
[Link to Screenshots/Recordings](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/117432311/408fae7c-7bfe-470e-b9c4-e3a5b334ae7c)

## Priority:
This issue is of the highest priority, affecting the visibility of all elements during collaboration.

Please review the provided information, and let us know if any additional details are necessary to address this matter promptly.

Thank you for your swift attention and assistance.

Best regards,
Eswara Satya

author: hisusqristos

title: Override Keyboard Events in Component
body:
## Perspective
In my team we are building a complex interactive application on top of the Excalidraw library and we currently need to override some keybindings with our custom logic. We could only override Ctrl+V thanks to the onPaste prop in the component but we had to do some workarounds to get some other keybindings to work. 

An example would be the **Delete** key. We don't want the user to delete elements directly with that binding but to trigger a request to delete a resource in our remote database, for example.

## Proposal

We would like to have some kind of prop to override the behavior of some specific keys.
An example would look like:
```jsx
  const keyOverrides: Record<string, (ev: KeyboardEvent) => any> = {
     Delete: deleteResource,
     c: copyResource,
   }

  return <Excalidraw keyOverrides={keyOverrides}></Excalidraw>
``` 
I suppose a prop like onKeyDown wouldn't be appropriate as we would have to override all keybindings.

In the mean time I would like to know if there is some workaround we can do to override some keys like **Delete**.

title: Feature Request: Table Creation for Data Modeling
body:
Description:

Issue Type: Feature Request

Request:

I would like to propose the addition of a new feature that enables users to create tables for data modeling within the application. This feature would greatly enhance the data modeling capabilities of the tool, allowing users to visually represent and structure their data more efficiently.

Use Case:

As a user involved in data modeling, I often find myself needing to create tables to represent various entities and their relationships. Currently, the process involves external tools or manual drawing, which can be cumbersome and prone to errors. Having an integrated table creation feature within the application would streamline this process and improve the overall user experience.

Suggested Implementation:

The proposed feature could include a drag-and-drop interface for creating tables, where users can define columns, data types, and relationships between tables. Additionally, features such as the ability to add comments or descriptions to columns would be beneficial for documentation purposes.

Benefits:

Enhanced data modeling capabilities directly within the application.
Improved user workflow and efficiency.
Streamlined visualization of data structures.
Reduction in the need for external tools for basic data modeling tasks.
Additional Information:


Thank you for considering this feature request. I look forward to any discussions or feedback on the proposed enhancement.

Environment:

 Web
author: Latish705

title: Excalidraw whiteboard accessibility issues reported in Deque Audit
body:
We conducted an accessibility audit of our pages with the assistance of [Deque](https://www.deque.com/). One of our pages includes a whiteboard integration using Excalidraw, which was also audited. We would like to share the issues identified by the Deque team specifically related to the Excalidraw whiteboard. So, that these accessibility issues can be planned to be fixed in upcoming versions. Excalidraw version used: `0.15.2` ### Issue 1: **Problem:** IDs of active elements must be unique. **Source Code:** ``` ``` **Recommendation to fix:** Document has active elements with the same id attribute: `zIGMdnVRlQIpVGLcllmpL-undefined` ### Issue 2: **Problem:** Hidden or empty element receives focus. **Source Code:** ``` ``` **Recommendation to fix:** Document has active elements with the same id attribute: `zIGMdnVRlQIpVGLcllmpL-undefined` The reading and navigation order MUST be logical and intuitive. All focusable elements MUST have a visual focus indicator when in focus. HOW TO FIX: Fix this issue by using ONE of the following techniques: 1. If the element should not be visible or focusable, remove the element from the DOM or hide it from all users with CSS such as display:none. 2. If the element is meant to be visible but not interactive, make it visible and remove the focus state. 3. If the element is meant to be visible and interactive, then ensure that it is both focusable and visible to all users. REFERENCE: Deque University: https://dequeuniversity.com/class/input-methods/keyboard-input/tab-order Deque University: https://dequeuniversity.com/class/input-methods/keyboard-input/visual-focus-indicator ### Issue 3: **Problem:** The visual focus indicator is missing altogether. **Source Code:** ``` ``` **Element description:** Checkbox and radio buttons in the toolbar **Element location:** In the "Draw Canvas" region **Description of the issue:** The focus indicator on the above-mentioned elements is missing. Hence it is hard for the users to interact with the controls on the page as there is no visible focus indicator. **Recommendation to fix:** RULE : All focusable elements MUST have a visual focus indicator when in focus. Focusable elements SHOULD have enhanced visual focus indicator styles. HOW TO FIX: Common keyboard focus indicator solutions include: 1. A 2px box around the focused element 2. A change in the background color of the focused element 3. The addition of an icon, such as an arrow, next to a menu item 4. The addition of a thick line under or next to the focused element 5. A distinctive change to the text of the component such as making it bold and/or underlined 6. Use the default browser focus indicator. NOTE: Since each browser has its own default focus indicator style, check each of the major browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, IE, Safari) to ensure the default focus indicator is visible as you tab through the page. A keyboard focus indicator can take different forms; it does not have to be a boring box. But the goal is to provide a difference in contrast between a component's default and focused states of at least 3 to 1 or another distinctive visual change. REFERENCE: Deque University: https://dequeuniversity.com/class/input-methods/keyboard-input/visual-focus-indicator ![65caf934-900d-11ee-aad2-879b9ea93fab](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/5d881e6c-62b0-4783-a4a4-a0feebbc66a2) ### Issue 4: **Problem:** New window opens automatically without warning. **Source Code:** ``` ``` **Description:** A window is automatically launched without warning when the user inputs a value in a text field or selects a checkbox or radio button. **Element description:** "Insert image" radio button **Element location:** In the "Shapes" region **Description of the issue:** When the user selects the above-mentioned radio button, a new window to select an image is opened without prior warning or indication. The immediate change in context will confuse the users. **Recommendation to fix:** RULE : Changing an element's value MUST NOT automatically trigger a change of context, unless the user is adequately advised ahead of time. HOW TO FIX: Fix this issue by using ONE of the following techniques: 1. Ensure that entering text into an edit box, checking a checkbox or radio button, or navigating to one of the options of a select control does not automatically open a new window. 2. Inform users ahead of time of such behavior by methods such as the text label for the UI control or some advisory text placed before the control that cautions the user of this behavior. REFERENCE: Deque University: https://dequeuniversity.com/class/forms/dynamic-custom/changes-context ![88564f0e-9011-11ee-ae41-07027bbedabf](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/fc283395-6339-4039-ab73-ba2b3e669167) ### Issue 5: **Problem:** Function cannot be performed by keyboard alone. **Source Code:** ``` ``` **Description:** There is no way to perform the function using only the keyboard on the same screen or on a qualifying conforming alternate version. **Element description:** Shapes (line, arrow, circle, ellipse, etc) **Element location:** In the "Draw Canvas" region **Description of the issue:** Keyboard users can select the action to perform from the toolbar (Ex: Rectangle, Square, etc) however, they are not able to continue to draw the shapes using the keyboard alone. Recommendation to fix RULE : Functionality MUST be available using the keyboard, unless the functionality cannot be accomplished in any known way using a keyboard. HOW TO FIX: Fix this issue by using use either a device independent event handler (one that works with both the mouse and the keyboard) or use both mouse dependent and keyboard dependent event handlers. Device independent event handlers include: onfocus, onblur, onselect, onchange, and onclick (when onclick is used with a keyboard-focusable element). Bad: Good: REFERENCE: Deque University:https://dequeuniversity.com/class/input-methods/keyboard-input/functionality ![2dea56a4-95a3-11ee-9975-0b8afe91b22a](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/05611356-fa3d-44a2-9cb5-dad4d744830c) ### Issue 6: **Problem:** Text content lacks 4.5:1 contrast ratio. **Source Code:** ```
To move canvas, hold mouse wheel or spacebar while dragging, or use the hand tool
``` **Description:** The contrast ratio between text and its background is not at least 4.5:1. Element description: "To move Canvas, hold mouse wheel or spacebar while dragging, or use the hand tool" "Click to start multiple points, drag for single line" "Click and drag, release when you are finished" "Tip: you can also add text by double clicking anywhere within the selection tool" "Hold Alt to revert the elements marked for deletion" elements **Element location:** In the "Draw Canvas" region **Description of the issue:** Contrast Details Foreground text color: #42464E Background color: #121212 Contrast Ratio: 1.97 : 1 The text needs to have a good contrast ratio with a background of 4.5:1 at the minimum. When this is not met, people with color blindness and low vision will find it difficult to read the content and with the above details, we can see that the element is not meeting the minimum threshold of 4.5:1 contrast ratio. **Steps to reproduce:** Select radio buttons to get the different text **Recommendation to fix:** RULE : Small text (under 18 point regular font or 14 point bold font) MUST have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5 to 1 with the background. HOW TO FIX: Fix this issue by adjusting the text and/or background to increase the contrast to at least 4.5 to 1. REFERENCE: Deque University: https://dequeuniversity.com/class/visual-design/contrast/text-against-background ![9cb15ee0-9010-11ee-a219-8ba07715751c](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/4202c1ad-d7ee-4878-a350-2eff51fe3f13) ![9cb15ad0-9010-11ee-874b-ab41b20a68ca](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/8b31414b-43bb-44b8-a251-5bf8cc407085) ![9cb14036-9010-11ee-9c9a-7bf2453d7a33](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/d5b24c73-1bca-466d-b7d4-9a86aa56bdd5) ![9caf5d20-9010-11ee-810c-876d0778e937](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/07599328-2d8a-409b-9b89-1c68e005a0b9) ![9caf578a-9010-11ee-8c74-3b4830a0a75f](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/ca761944-4dda-4bd4-98ce-b6d4fd0f7910) ### Issue 7: **Problem:** State of active component lacks 3 to 1 contrast ratio. **Source Code:** ``` ``` **Description:** The state of an active component lacks 3 to 1 contrast ratio. Element description: "Keep selected tool active after drawing" checkbox "Selection" radio button **Element location:** In the "Draw Canvas" region **Description of the issue:** Contrast Details Selected state color: #1D1D20 Adjacent color: #27272B Contrast Ratio: 1.13 : 1 When the color contrast ratio of an interactive element's state with its background is less than 3:1, it becomes difficult for a color blind or low vision user to understand different states of the element. **Recommendation to fix:** RULE : The visual state of an active user interface component MUST have sufficient contrast of 3 to 1 with the adjacent background. Exceptions exist. HOW TO FIX: Fix this issue by adjusting the visual focus indicator or state indicator (e.g. selected, checked, pressed, etc.) of the user interface component and/or background to increase the contrast with either the inner or outer adjacent background to at least 3 to 1. REFERENCE: Deque University: https://dequeuniversity.com/class/visual-design/contrast/non-text-contrast WCAG Understanding document: https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG22/Understanding/non-text-contrast ![eb962ab8-900b-11ee-a18f-5bef7a05d7ba](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/24875366/bc5c69c7-9d45-4451-a594-d2953d3d6c08) ### Issue 8: **Problem:** Buttons must have discernible text. **Source Code:** ```

title: Set the text anchor to the bottom by default & make text anchor editable
body: Currently, there is no option to set the text anchor in excalidraw. This is not problematic, but when it is exported to svg, excalidraw exported images are misaligned when we open it using other svg editors, as they tend to assume the text anchor is set to the bottom; you can see this phenomenon when you open the excalidraw exported svg in inkscape or drawio (by importing svg image). In Inkscape, the left is inkscape generated text and the right comes from excalidraw (the small white square box is the text anchor): The actual svg file is following: You can see the misalignment of text rendering due to the peculiarity of excalidraw's text alignment. This discourages to embed excalidraw generated svg image into other vector editor. Related: https://graphicdesign.stackexchange.com/questions/116197/how-do-you-move-the-text-anchor-in-inkscape

author: jamesbradlee

title: BUG: "Stats for nerds" window no longer displays an object's size while it is being resized, when "Snap to objects" is off
body:
**Describe the bug**
When "Snap to objects" is off, the "Stats for nerds" window will not display an object's size while it is being resized.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open https://excalidraw.com/
2. Draw a rectangle
3. Turn "Snap to objects" off
4. Display the "Stats for nerds" window
5. Select the rectangle and resize it
6. The "Stats for nerds" window does not display the object's size live while it is being resized

**Expected behavior**
In previous versions of Excalidraw, the "Stats for nerds" window used to display the object's size live while it was being resized

**Discussion**
Seeing on object's size live while resizing it is an absolute requirement when using Excalidraw for floorplans and other drawings to scale.

When "Snap to objects" is on, the "Stats for nerds" window does display the object's size live while it is being resized, but the object's size is constrained by the snap to object functionality, so this is not a usable workaround.

author: ghost

title: support `roundness` for images
body:
To add roundness support when rendering HTMLImageElement on canvas, we'll need to add a [clip path](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/CanvasRenderingContext2D/clip) likely here:

https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/blob/4249b7dec888711796fac1b043b3e982b35fa647/packages/excalidraw/renderer/renderElement.ts#L313-L329

And use [<mask>](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/SVG/Element/mask) when rendering to SVG.

The clip path & mask should align with the algo we use for rectangle roundness.

author: EduHerranz

title: FR: Perceptual Image Hashing
body:
Currently images are referenced by hashing its content with sha-1 which gives totally different id to very similar images. In difference, I think perceptual image hashing is better alternative here.

Example: https://github.com/JohannesBuchner/imagehash

```
Image hashes tell whether two images look nearly identical.

This is different from cryptographic hashing algorithms (like MD5, SHA-1) where tiny changes in the image give completely different hashes.

In image fingerprinting, we actually want our similar inputs to have similar output hashes as well.
```

title: BUG: Color Picker does not work when Excalidraw is not full screen (Includes Solution)
body:
Hello, 
Excalidraw has an issue where the color picker does not open inside of its container especially when the excalidraw is not inside of a container that takes the whole page (when the page is scrollable). I was able to track down the issue specifically. 
It comes from a simple CSS change for the element data-radix-popper-content-wrapper(wrapper of the color picker) to have a style that is position: absolute instead of fixed.

body:
Hello!

I've been using Excalidraw for presenting workshops for my development team. It's been great! But presentation mode lacks a feature that could greatly improve my and other people's way of using it.

I like to use illustrations and diagrams to make presentations, but much of what I'll show is drawn live, so I can build on top of what I am explaining.

If I want to use presentation mode to setup an ordering, it's kinda janky to exit the mode, close Slides sidebar, start drawing, and then come back to presentation mode to continue the order I've setup. body: ### Main problem Although I went through the docs, issues and roadmap, i'm still not sure if this functionality already exists or not or if it is WIP, but i'd like to be able to customize the main toolbar. In my case I want to have a vertically aligned toolbar on the left side of the screen, change the icons, help messages, yet keep the essential working the same. Somewhat similar to the idea mentioned in #6140 where i'll be able to group the settings separately so that the settings toolbar (that pops up on the left when a user clicks on pen, shape etc) isn't permanently visible and takes up too much space. Of course i'm not saying that we should replace the current UX in any way as that works for a lot of people but i'd like to have a [children component API](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs/@excalidraw/excalidraw/api/children-components) for the main and settings toolbar. **If this already exists in any way or is being worked on please let me know.** I have to implement this regardless at my job so it's either directly in the library as a part of the children component bit (open to contribute) or separately in my own project from scratch to just solve my own use-case. I'm open to other ideas too. ### Toolbar in question

author: sanakanani

title: [BUG] After stylizing an arrow or line the app doesn't allow drawing another arrow or line
body:
### What is the bug?

After drawing an arrow or a line by using multiple clicks (basically not using click and drag to create a single straight arrow or line respectively), if the stylizing options have been clicked on the left hand side, then the user is not able to continue drawing a new arrow or line, respectively (either with multiple clicks or a straight arrow or line). Also the cursor is a cross and not in the default mode to indicate that continuing drawing is not allowed. Along with all these, the arrow or line icon in the top toolbar is still selected indicating that the app is in "drawing mode".

### How to reproduce?

Click on the toolbar on the top the option for drawing an arrow or a line. Make as many clicks as you want to create a line or an arrow that is not necessarily straight. Next, go to the styling options on the left side and click any option to stylize the shape you just created. Then try to create line or an arrow (respectively) by clicking in the canvas.

### What should happen instead?

By clicking on the canvas after the stylization process a new shape should be created. Also the tooltip right below the top toolbar that states _"Click on last point or press Escape or Enter to finish"_ should be replaced with _"Click to start multiple points, or drag for single line"_. Furthermore the pointer should be replaced with the default and the selection icon should be selected.

Another alternative would be is to continue drawing the existent shape the has been stylized, by continuing clicking on the canvas, since all the indications (pointer, toolbar) show that "drawing mode" is still turned on.

My personal opinion is that the user should be able to continue drawing the existent shape because the user didn't follow the guide of the tooltip _"Click on last point or press Escape or Enter to finish"_.

Obviously, the desired behaviour is up for discussion to decide collectively what the behaviour should be.

### System specifications

- OS: macOS Version 14.1.1 (Build 23B81) 14.1.1 arm64
- Browser: Opera One(version: 106.0.4998.28) (arm64)
- Version tested on: v0.17.0 (2023-11-14)
- Date tested: 24th of January 2024 EET

author: KarolGralewski

title: [Feature Request] Enable customizable context menus
body:
Hello there,

I love the customization that can be done on the main menu, with options to disable specific default options, or the ability to reimplement the menu yourself with pre-styled components. However, I am interested in this same functionality being afforded to the Context Menu (menu that appears on a right click, taking the name "Context Menu" from the source code). Currently, there does not seem to be the ability to customize the menu and disable pre-defined options or reimplement the menu with custom options.

The use case for this request is two-fold:
1. For adding new functionality, I wanted to add a "Report" item to the right click menu, which would allow for content moderation if necessary. I can definitely see other use cases for adding new functionality into the existing menu options.
2. For disabling existing functionality, a containing app may want to disable the ability for the user to turn on/off view mode themselves and have the application control this functionality. Or the app may want to remove the "Stats for nerds" options.

This functionality does not seem to be supported by the Excalidraw NPM package currently but would be great to add more customization into the package.

Thank you for your time and effort!

title: type conflict because of conflicting type definition: <<project root>>\node_modules\@excalidraw\excalidraw
body:
@ad1992, any idea which dependency results in `@excalidraw/excalidraw` recursively appearing in node_modules under the project root?

As you know, I retained the legacy umd build process and use tsc with the old tsconfig-types.json. When I run build I get a whole host of type errors:
![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/14358394/5b94868b-7771-4df8-aae9-fcf8c22410f0)

The type error seems to originate from the excalidraw package under node_modules that is maybe referencing an earlier version of excalidraw? Or something like this? Any idea why `@excalidraw/excalidraw` is downloaded as a dependency? Which dependency is driving this?

# What I've done so far
1. I deleted the node_modules folder and ran `yarn`. The `<<project root>>\node_modules\@excalidraw\excalidraw ` was created again.
2. I renamed the folder to `<<project root>>\node_modules\@excalidraw\excalidraw_x` and ran `yarn build:umd`. tsc executed without any errors.

# My investigation into dependencies.
These are all the instances where `@excalidraw/excalidraw` is referenced in a `package.json` file anywhere in the project tree including node_modules. I guess only instances where `@excalidraw/excalidraw` is in dependencies, not in devDependencies. Thus the candidate culprits are:
- examples
- with-script-in-browser
- with-nextjs

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/14358394/2c4832eb-afb0-40db-82dd-5c84b24913e2)

author: SvenAelterman

title: old-deployment artifacts unavailability problem
body:
We're getting a lot of errors where clients try to load chunks that do not exist.

![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/5153846/e5039f7d-4cfd-4746-b99d-2ae8b9f185cc)
![image](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw/assets/5153846/ebfa10c1-0854-4152-8c6e-9b40b886ea70)

Not confirmed, but the issue almost certainly arises from the fact that on each deployment, previous chunks are removed if changed (or possibly always, not sure), so if we still have clients on old versions (because their ServiceWorker didn't update) and they try to lazyload a chunk, it won't be hosted anymore.

Vercel recently introduced [Skew protection](https://vercel.com/blog/version-skew-protection) which addresses a similar issue, but focused on client/server divergence (e.g. serverless functions) within the next.js context — so not something we can use to solve this.

---

The only effective solution I can come up that at least sounds feasible is doing this:

On release, the build artifacts will be uploaded to AWS S3 or comparable, so that on subsequent release we'd merge the new build artifacts with previous N deployments, and then manually upload the build artifacts to Vercel (sidestepping their auto-deploy workflow).

This will require, manual build step, provisioning and maintaining a bucket, and manual deploy step to Vercel. Meaning, we'll have to sidestep any Vercel build/deploy automation. It's doable, but it's annoying, and it's also surprisingly slow.

Any other ideas, besides catching these errors and just telling people to hard-refresh?

/cc @ad1992

title: Unable to use excalidraw in browser extension [CSP lvl. 3]
body: I am trying to use excalidraw inside chrome extension that injects excalidraw into a webpage but I am not able to due to strict CSPs. Excalidraw depends on some remote resources from https://unpkg.com/ but it is mentioned in the documentation that it is possible to host those files by myself. And that is what I am doing in my extension. However in order to make excalidraw actually use the local version of those files instead of the remote one I need to set window.EXCALIDRAW_ASSET_PATH to chrome.runtime.getURL("") (that's where these files reside) but it is not possible as fetching of those resources happens from the top level window (the webpage) and not content script. I cannot set global variables of the webpage as extensions content sripts live in an isolated world, where only DOM is shared between content script and the webpage. I tried to set this variable by injecting inline script (since DOM is the only shared thing) but this is not allowed due to strict CSPs of chrome extensions. I really do need a way to force excalidraw to use my local resources but I don't want to modify code of the library.

author: Khongchai

title: Eraser Device
body:
Some drawing tablets (e.g. UGEE S1060W) on linux implement the eraser button as a separate device. As far as I'm aware, Excalidraw's current implementation of stylus erasers relies on the tablet issuing a mouse button 5 event, but this doesn't cover the cases where tablets simply use a different designated "eraser" device which issues mouse button 1.

```
❯ xinput list
⎡ Virtual core pointer                    	id=2	[master pointer  (3)]
⎜   ↳ Virtual core XTEST pointer              	id=4	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ FRMW0001:00 32AC:0006 Consumer Control  	id=9	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ PIXA3854:00 093A:0274 Mouse             	id=10	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ PIXA3854:00 093A:0274 Touchpad          	id=11	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ ImExPS/2 Generic Explorer Mouse         	id=13	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ HVUG MOUSE                              	id=18	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ HVUG STYLUS Pen (0)                     	id=21	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ HVUG ERASER Eraser (0)                  	id=22	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ Hanvon Ugee UGEE S1060W Mouse touch     	id=15	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ Hanvon Ugee UGEE S1060W stylus          	id=16	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎜   ↳ Hanvon Ugee UGEE S1060W eraser          	id=17	[slave  pointer  (2)]
⎣ Virtual core keyboard                   	id=3	[master keyboard (2)]
    ↳ Virtual core XTEST keyboard             	id=5	[slave  keyboard (3)]
    ↳ Video Bus                               	id=6	[slave  keyboard (3)]
    ↳ Power Button                            	id=7	[slave  keyboard (3)]
    ↳ FRMW0001:00 32AC:0006 Wireless Radio Control	id=8	[slave  keyboard (3)]
    ↳ AT Translated Set 2 keyboard            	id=12	[slave  keyboard (3)]
    ↳ FRMW0001:00 32AC:0006 Consumer Control  	id=14	[slave  keyboard (3)]
    ↳ HVUG ERASER                             	id=19	[slave  keyboard (3)]
    ↳ HVUG STYLUS                             	id=20	[slave  keyboard (3)]
```

Here you can see the "HVUG STYLUS Pen (0)" device, which gives input with normal use. When the eraser button is pressed though, this device stops providing input and instead the "HVUG ERASER Eraser (0)" device starts giving input. Note that when the eraser is used, it still only sends a mouse button 1 event.

[Here](https://github.com/xournalpp/xournalpp/blob/df6bd42c0660cad169fed4437f00c33031489326/src/core/gui/inputdevices/StylusInputHandler.cpp#L196C35-L196C54) is an example of how Xournal++ does it, but I believe that uses GTK to get input so I'm not sure how that applies to a browser application.
author: LennyPhoenix

title: Allow setting EXCALIDRAW_ASSET_PATH as env variable
body:
## Background
According to [this part](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs/@excalidraw/excalidraw/installation#static-assets) of the documentation. In order to force excalidraw to use static assets hosted by me my code needs to set global variable `window.EXCALIDRAW_ASSET_PATH`. However in case of e.g. chrome extensions due to security reasons it is not possible to set such variable on the *parent* window level, from which those assets are requested (in my usecase excalidraw is injected into webpage).

Please keep in mind that in manifest V3 there is no way to allow external content to be loaded into webpages (again due to security reasons it is not possible to relax CSPs).

## Solution proposal
Allow to set `EXCALIDRAW_ASSET_PATH` as environment variable similar to how it is done in case of [process.env.IS_PREACT](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs/@excalidraw/excalidraw/integration#preact).

Related [discord thread](https://discord.com/channels/723672430744174682/818853761886715964/1204359856740499476)
author: krzysztofMlczk

title: Zoom with just RMB & wheel
body:
Some new drawing apps give an ability to zoom in/out with just the mouse, which is more convenient than holding an additional keyboard button like Ctrl. The applications track that right mouse button is held and resolve it as held Ctrl button. So you can just hold the **right mouse** button **and scroll** the mouse wheel for zoom ― 2 fingers of 1 hand. 

For example, Pixso's whiteboard application have such nice feature. 

Maybe there are more convenient ways of such zoom control with just the mouse.

title: Ability to find desired command or function
body:
Hi,

I think a feature similar to Sublime Text's Command Palette (Shift+Command+P) would provide a convenient way to access any command or function via single shortcut, allowing quickly find it without navigating through menus or remembering specific key combinations.

Thank you for really nice tool.
PetrasL
